Metadata.title: GoodTribes.org
Metadata.description: Connecting skilled volunteers with impact-driven organisations to build a better world together.

Footer.foundationBlurb: GoodTribes is a nonprofit foundation working toward long-term sustainable environmental and societal development. The foundation runs GoodTribes.org to help people and organisations who want to make the world better.
Footer.copyrightNote: Every project contributes to the 2030 Agenda

Install.prompt: Install GoodTribes for quicker access, even offline.
